title: Emergency Outdoor Blanket Insulated Thermal Reflector Retains Body Heat 10 Pack
description:
Mylar foil assists the body in heat retention during emergency situations. Can be used as a regular blanket in cold conditions while sleeping because it's reusable it won't tear easily allowing for multiple uses in different situations. Emergency blankets are individually bagged. Perfect for emergency protection in all weather conditions. Waterproof and windproof. Will not crack or shrink. Reflects 90 percent of your body heat back to you. Makes sure to have this with you hiking just in case Hypothermia sets in!

Emergency Outdoor Blanket Insulated Thermal Reflector Retains Body Heat 10 Pack

Mylar foil assists the body in heat retention during emergency situations. Can be used as a regular blanket in cold conditions while sleeping because it's reusable it won't tear easily allowing for multiple uses in different situations.

Key Features

  • COMPACT FOR EASY STORAGE: Compacted Dimensions 5" x 1" x 1" (LxWxH) allow you to store these in your car glove compartment, home emergency kit, first aid kit, or hiking and bug out bag
  • GREAT FOR BIG AND TALL: Unfolded Dimensions 84" x 52" make these blankets ideal for wrapping up in to help maximize body heat reflection or cover big and tall people in need of immediate warmth
  • MADE FOR FUNCTION AND CONVENIENCE: Individually Packaged 10 pack of Mylar Reflective Blankets with Instructional Guidelines with each blanket so you don't have to scramble in an emergency, while their flame, wind, & water retardant material is manufactured for use in outdoor survival situations
  • MAXIMUM HEAT RETENTION: Made of Mylar, these blankets reflect 90% of body heat to aid in hypothermia and shock prevention
  • VERSATILE EMERGENCY APPLICATIONS: Ideal for automotive, boating, hiking, camping, home first aid, adventure, and natural disaster kits and preparedness to name a few

Product Specifications

  • MPN: EB_TB215-275
  • UPC: 704862287301
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: 10 Pack
